creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
FYI, last time I tested libfmt 10.0.0, 19 ports are broken and I only fixed 3 of them.

Fixed:
games/0ad
games/easyrpg-player
textproc/fcitx5

Not yet fixed:
cad/openroad
devel/malloy
editors/turbo
emulators/dolphin-emu
emulators/pcsx2
ftp/coeurl
games/0ad
games/devilutionX
games/easyrpg-player
multimedia/kodi
net/arataga
net/ceph14
net/gerbera
net/knxd
science/cantera
x11/waybar
